problem_solved: Omnichannel engagement with healthcare providers in pharma commercial
solution_description: Omnichannel Customer Engagement (OCE) platform for life sciences. Combines CRM, content, and analytics for coordinated HCP engagement across channels. Competes with Veeva CRM.
notes: IQVIA's CRM competitor to Veeva. Omnichannel-native design. Leverages IQVIA data assets. Growing presence in pharma commercial.
